title: atylosia calycina
intro: Atylosia calycina, also known as the calycina bean or the butterfly pea, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Atylosia calycina include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Atylosia calycina can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by boiling its leaves in water, or as a powder by drying and grinding its leaves.
